meaning: n.比萨(意大利中部一城市)
examples: It is famous for the leaning tower of Pisa.
If you think that Pisa has only one leaning tower, you may just be wrong.
The Pisa tests have become a key part of an increasingly global perspective on education standards.
The PISA assessments of 15-year-olds show Wales falling further behind since the 2006 tests.
